title: Wide Op w/ no temp when using interfaces with --public-flat-rw

features.name: interface with wide logic signal exceeding 64 bits
features.description: Code should include an interface declaring a logic signal with width greater than 64 bits

features.name: wide signal slice assignment with xor operation
features.description: Code should include an always block where a wide signal slice is assigned via XOR with an unsized literal

features.name: public-flat-rw flag with wide interface signals
features.description: Code should include compilation with --public-flat-rw flag when using interface signals wider than 64 bits
